questions.explanation: Accident Insurance provides for compensation against injuries or hazards which may be due to a person or group of persons. It covers motor vehicle insurance as well.

questions.question: A cheque that is payable to whoever presents it is known as
questions.explanation: Bearer cheque is payable to the bearer i.e. whoever presents it. It is cashed over the counter without having to be endorsed by the person presenting it.

questions.question: Booklets containing a range of products, their uses and prices are called
questions.explanation: Catalogue is a type of advertisement ideal for manufacturers in other countries or towns. It enables consumers to know about such products and to order or request for them.

questions.question: Advantages of pipeline transport include all except
questions.explanation: Pipe line transportation can be prone to leakages and authorised tapping by the people, as is the case in the Niger Delta.

questions.question: A document which entitles its holder to the gods named on it, which is stored in a specific warehouse is called
questions.explanation: A warrant allows the goods to be released when duties have been paid and the authority concerned issue out warehouse warrant for it.

questions.question: An International organisation that influence and fix the price of oil in the International markets is
questions.explanation: Organisation of the petroleum exporting countries (OPEC) is a cartel organisation that ensure efficient and regular supply of petroleum & ensuring the stabilization of prices in International oil markets.

questions.question: The function of management that establish objectives for the organization and trying to determine the best ways to accomplish them
questions.explanation: Planning is the most important and precedes the other functions of management. It involves setting policies and procedures.

questions.question: Examples of Commercial occupation are all except
questions.explanation: Commercial workers engage in massive trading in goods and services and also in other ancillary services that facilitate trading, e.g. advertising, insurance, banking, transportation, warehousing, communication, and tourism. Goldsmith is not a commercial occupation.

questions.question: One of these is not part of small-scale retailers
questions.explanation: Small-scale retailers are typically local businesses that serve a limited geographic area or a small niche market. They include urban stores, roadside traders, and itinerant traders. Supermarkets, on the other hand, are large-scale retailers that serve a wide geographic area and offer a wide variety of products. Therefore, supermarkets are not part of small-scale retailers.

questions.question: A self-contained chunk of code with principal aim to replicate preferably undetected and to copy itself into the computer's memory and the computer's hard-disk is
questions.explanation: A virus usually interferes with operating system, corrupts program and data files when the virus is on computer memory.

questions.question: All activities that contribute towards making goods and services available to the people are
questions.explanation: All activities that contribute towards making goods and services available to the people are 'Economic activities'. Economic activities refer to the actions that involve the production, distribution, and consumption of goods and services. These activities are driven by the desire to satisfy human needs and wants.

questions.question: One of these is not a factor affecting prices of securities

C.text: The Forces of demand and supply

questions.explanation: The financial statements of a company do not directly affect the prices of securities. The prices of securities are influenced by factors such as the forces of demand and supply, activities of speculators, and the political situation of a country. However, the financial statements of a company can indirectly affect the prices of securities as they provide information about the company's financial health, which can influence investors' decisions.

questions.question: Examples of consumer goods include all except
questions.explanation: Examples of consumer goods include all except 'Nurse'. Consumer goods are products bought for consumption by the average consumer. This includes items like cars, spoons, and shoes. A nurse, however, is a professional who provides health care services, not a consumer good.

questions.question: Which of these is a document used in International trade?
questions.explanation: Invoice is one of the six main documents sent to the importer. The invoice will state in detail the nature, quality, quantity and price of the goods making up the consignment.

Olu Stationery Ltd
17, Kakawa Street
Lagos

Dear Sir,
We require 200 pieces of 0.8mm fountain pens and 1000 pieces of plain single line 21cm × 18cm exercise books.

Please give us quotes for the respective articles for immediate delivery and a statement of your terms of trade.

Yours Faithfully
Manager.
questions.explanation: A quotation is a statement of the current price and terms of trade of a product or service. Usually a quotation is an answer to an inquiry.

questions.question: In Nigeria, it is mandatory for all business enterprises to be registered with the
questions.explanation: All businesses must be registered with the Corporate Affairs Commission and a certificate of incorporation will be issued to any business incorporated.

questions.question: Which function of money is described in the following statement? It serves as a medium through which business transactions are carried out.
questions.explanation: The function of money described in the statement is the 'Medium of exchange'. This function of money means that it is widely accepted as a method of payment in exchange for goods or services. It facilitates transactions by providing a standardized method of exchange, which simplifies trade and eliminates the need for barter.

questions.question: Services are made up of
questions.explanation: Services are made up of 'direct and indirect services'. Direct services are those that involve direct interaction with the customer, such as a hairdresser or a taxi driver. Indirect services are those that are provided in support of other services, such as IT support in a large office.

questions.question: A number of shipping lines operating on a certain route, which agree on a common policy regarding the conditions under which goods are to be carried
questions.explanation: A number of shipping lines operating on a certain route, which agree on a common policy regarding the conditions under which goods are to be carried, is known as a 'Conference'. In the context of shipping, a conference is a group of shipping companies who have agreed to common freight rates and other terms of service. This helps to ensure stability and predictability in the shipping market.

questions.question: An abridged message sent at express speed to reach its destination faster than the airmail letters is known as
questions.explanation: Telegram can be sent and delivered at any time of the day. Charges are made according to the number of words contained therein.

questions.question: An offer extended to several people at once is called
questions.explanation: An invitation to treat is extended to several people at once. It is different from an offer e.g. Goods displayed in a shelf.

questions.question: Which of the limited liability companies have a limit of fifty members and do not issues their shares to the public?
questions.explanation: A private limited liability company is a profit making business with few shareholders and no open market for its shares. The minimum number of shareholders is two and the maximum number is fifty.

questions.question: A fall in the value of a country's currency vis-a-vis other currencies is known as
questions.explanation: Depreciation is the term used when there is a fall in the value of a country's currency vis-a-vis other currencies. It is a decrease in the value of a currency relative to other currencies. This decrease in value reduces the cost of the country's exports, making them more competitive in international markets, but increases the cost of imports.

questions.question: A responsibility to control environmental pollution is the responsibility of
questions.explanation: A business has a responsibility to control environmental pollution e.g. water, land, sound and air pollution arising from their operations.

questions.question: The policy used when contracts are awarded as a result of tender is
questions.explanation: Bid pricing is used mostly in government contracts. If the object is to obtain the contract, cost will be considered mainly to determine the level of Minimum Price.

questions.question: Computer that process data in the form of values is
questions.explanation: Analog computers are those computers that are similar to use for measuring instruments such as Thermometer, Voltmeter i.e measured in value and scale.

questions.question: A partnership may be automatically dissolved due to the following factors except
questions.explanation: Dissolution of partnership is the coming to an end of a partnership agreement, i.e the breakup of a partnership business. Admission of new partners does not automatically dissolve the partnership.

questions.question: The difference between the buying price and the selling price of a share is referred to as
questions.explanation: The buying price of a share is the lower price and the selling price is the higher price. The difference between the two gives what is called Jobber's turn.

questions.question: A company which another company is a member and control the board of directors or hold more than half of its equity is termed
questions.explanation: Subsidiary is a company in which a holding firm has controlling interest by acquiring more than 51% of its share.

questions.question: All except one is not a corporation and boards at the federal level
questions.explanation: FRCN (Federal Radio Corporation of Nigeria), NNPC (Nigerian National Petroleum Corporation), and CBN (Central Bank of Nigeria) are all corporations and boards at the federal level. MAN, on the other hand, is a trade union for manufacturers in Nigeria and not a corporation or board at the federal level.

questions.question:
Use the following information to answer this question.

The following is a summary of the asset and liabilities of Ojo trading company as at 31st December, 2018

| Initial Capital | 5000 |
| Net Profit | 1000 |
| Furniture | 2000 |
| Equipment | 2900 |
| Debtors | 100 |
| Stock | 1000 |
| Bank | 500 |

From the above, calculate the:
Current assets
questions.explanation: Current assets are assets that a company expects to convert to cash or use up within one year or its operating cycle, whichever is longer. In this case, the current assets are Debtors (100), Stock (1000), and Bank (500) which sum up to 1600.

questions.question:
Use the following information to answer this question.

The following is a summary of the asset and liabilities of Ojo trading company as at 31st December, 2018

| Initial Capital | 5000 |
| Net Profit | 1000 |
| Furniture | 2000 |
| Equipment | 2900 |
| Debtors | 100 |
| Stock | 1000 |
| Bank | 500 |

From the above, calculate the:
Fixed assets
questions.explanation: Fixed assets, also known as long-term assets or property, plant, and equipment (PP&E), are assets that are expected to generate benefits over multiple periods. In this case, the fixed assets are Furniture (2000) and Equipment (2900) which sum up to 4900.

questions.question:
Use the following information to answer this question.

The following is a summary of the asset and liabilities of Ojo trading company as at 31st December, 2018

| Initial Capital | 5000 |
| Net Profit | 1000 |
| Furniture | 2000 |
| Equipment | 2900 |
| Debtors | 100 |
| Stock | 1000 |
| Bank | 500 |

From the above, calculate the:
Current liabilities
questions.explanation: From accounting equation; Assets = Capital + liabilities. Total Assets = Fixed Assets (4900) + Current Assets (1600) = 6500. Capital = Initial Capital (5000) + Net Profit (1000) = 6000. Therefore, liabilities = Assets - Capital = 6500 - 6000 = 500.

questions.question: The communication aspect of the marketing mix is
questions.explanation: Promotion mix deals with how the business enterprise informs the consumer about the existence and the qualities of its products.

questions.question: The commission on a postal order is
questions.explanation: Postal order is a means of payment provided by post office for transfer of small sum of money. A commission known as POUNDAGE is charged on postal order and it valid for 6 month.

questions.question: The marketing concept emphasizes

A.text: use of promotional tools to stimulate sale

D.text: sales of goods directly to customers

questions.explanation: The marketing concept refers to the principle that the consumer is sovereign i.e. the consumer should be treated as 'kings' and it is assumed that consumer is always right. The ideas behind marketing concept are: Consumer orientation: It emphasizes on understanding consumers' real needs, and satisfying them better than any competitor. Consumer satisfaction: A measurement that determines how happy customers are with a company's products, services, and capabilities. Integrated marketing: An approach to creating a unified and seamless experience for consumers to interact with the brand/enterprises.

questions.question: An article used as a means of exchange in the early days of trade in West Africa was
questions.explanation: In the history of commerce, the Arab merchants brought goods like salt, cowries, copper, cloth, books, etc which were exchanged for kola nuts, slaves, gold, hides etc.

questions.question: A group of sellers who pool their resources to buy goods in large quantities and sell to its members is a
questions.explanation: Wholesale co-operative society is formed by small scale wholesalers who purchase goods in bulk from the manufacturers at a reasonable price and sell in small quantities to retail co-operative.

questions.question: An undertaking to repair a customer's vehicle for a certain period after it has been sold is
questions.explanation: After-sale services is a services renders to the buyer or customers after the sale of the products. It is a form of customer service.

questions.question: Which of the following organizations provide essential goods and services at low cost to citizens?
questions.explanation: Public enterprise is also known as statutory cooperation or public corporation. It is set up, owned and financed by the government to provide services to the members of the public.

questions.question: The resources put together to create goods and services are
questions.explanation: Factors of production are the agents, components or resources which are combined together to produce goods and services. The factors of production are: land, labour, capital and entrepreneur.

questions.question: Which of the following documents would a shareholder inspect to know his voting rights?
questions.explanation: Article of Association is a document in which the regulations which govern the internal management of the company's affairs, the duties, rights and power of the members are stated. The content contains: the method of issue capital, method of holding meetings, the rights of shareholders, method of sharing dividend etc.

questions.question: Average stock is derived by adding

A.text: opening stock to closing stock divided by 2

B.text: closing stock to purchase divided by 2

questions.explanation: The average stock is calculated by adding the opening stock to the closing stock and then dividing by 2. This gives the average amount of inventory a business has on hand during a certain period. This is useful for understanding inventory turnover and how efficiently a business is moving its stock.

questions.question: An internal source of finance to an entrepreneur is
questions.explanation: Internal source of finance refer to money that comes from within a business. There are several internal methods an entrepreneur can use, including owners capital, retained profit and selling assets.

questions.question: A country's visible balance of payment is made up of

A.text: interest on loans to foreign countries

questions.explanation: A country's visible balance of payment is made up of earnings from goods exported. The balance of payment transactions consist of imports and exports of goods, services, and capital, as well as a transfer payment, such as foreign aid and remittances.

questions.question: One of the functions of commercial banks that cannot be performed by central banks is

D.text: collection of deposits from the public

questions.explanation: Commercial banks are financial institutions which accept deposits and other valuables from the public for safekeeping with the sole aim of making profit. One of the functions of commercial banks is the acceptance of deposit and lending to customer etc. Central banks do not accept deposits from the general public.

questions.question: Dealers in stock exchange such as bulls, bears and stags are categorized as
questions.explanation: Dealers in the stock exchange market are known as speculator. The speculators are: the bears, the bull and the stag.

questions.question: One of the functions of a trade association is to
questions.explanation: FUNCTIONS OF TRADE ASSOCIATION: Provide trade, Pool trade and credit information; Fix minimum price for their goods; Assist needy members; Educate members on trade activities; Settle dispute among members; Preventing cut-throat or unfair competition; Promoting and extending trade through 'legislative work'.

questions.question: Which of the following is not a right of a consumer?
questions.explanation: Rights of consumers are: they have the right to safety, they have the right to be informed, they have the right to choose between alternatives, they have the right to good things of life, they have the right to be heard, they have the right to seek redress to correct any injustice. Right to buy on credit is not a consumer right.

questions.question: A retail business that sells goods by post, using catalogue is a
questions.explanation: Mail order firm sells goods by mail order or by post rather than through retail premises. The firm uses catalog marketing with direct merchandise shipment to customers.

questions.question: An advantage of rail transport is that it
questions.explanation: Rail transport is a means of conveying goods and passengers by train. The advantages of rail transport are: suitable for long distance, standard rate of charges, suitable for heavy and bulky goods, it is very cheap, high capacity, less prone to accident, train operates in schedule.

questions.question: The provision of services is classified under
questions.explanation: Tertiary production is concerned with the provision of services to the people e.g. doctors, lawyers, teachers, policemen etc.

questions.question: A document that instructs an agent to buy goods from a named firm is
questions.explanation: A close indent restricts the agent to a named manufacturer from whom the goods must be obtained.

questions.question: Which of the following is not a characteristic of a commercial bank?

B.text: Established with the view of making profit

questions.explanation: The characteristics of commercial banks are: it is a limited liability company, the motive for its establishment is profit making, they are members of the money market, commercial banks are incorporated, they accept deposits and other valuables, they are owned by private individuals, institutions or governments. Issuing bank notes is a function of the central bank, not commercial banks.

questions.question: A document used to ensure correct payment of duty at the importing country is
questions.explanation: A certificate of origin is a document that specifies the country in which the goods were produced or manufactured. It is often required by customs authorities in the importing country to determine the correct tariff rates and assess any applicable duties or trade restrictions. This document helps ensure that the correct duties are paid on imported goods.

questions.question: Which of the following groups would advocate for the supply of constant electricity to households?
questions.explanation: Consumer's association are advocacy groups that seek to protect people from corporate abuse like unsafe products, predatory lending, false advertising, pollution etc.

questions.question: A cheque is specially crossed if

A.text: only two parallel lines are drawn across it

B.text: it could be paid over the counter

C.text: the name of the bank is written between two parallel lines drawn across it

D.text: the name of the account holder is written between two parallel lines drawn across it

questions.explanation: In special crossing, the name of the bank is inserted between the transverse lines. This restrict payment to a specific name bank.

questions.question: The growth of commerce is not enhanced by

C.text: development of modern forms of production

questions.explanation: Low per capita income is one of the factors affecting the growth of commerce in West Africa. However, the factors that encourage the growth of commerce are: emergence of specialization, development of modern forms of production, government participation, population growth, role of advertising etc.

questions.question: When a share with a nominal value of #50 is quoted at #70, it is being sold
questions.explanation: Shares at a premium is a situation whereby shares are quoted above the nominal value i.e. the issue price is greater than the nominal value.

questions.question: The law by which a seller transfers the property in goods to a buyer at an agreed price is the
questions.explanation: The Sales of goods act was introduced to regulate the respective rights and duties of the vendor and purchaser. The sales of goods act is a contract whereby the seller transfers or agrees to transfer the property in goods to the buyer for a money consideration called the price.

questions.question: A retail store that sells a single product from a particular manufacturer is a
questions.explanation: A tied shop is a retail store that sells a single product from a particular manufacturer. This is different from a shopping mall which is a large enclosed building that contains many individual shops, a hypermarket which is a large store that sells a wide variety of goods, and a chain store which is one of a series of stores owned by the same company and selling the same products.

questions.question: One of the products of the construction industry is a
questions.explanation: Constructive industry is concerned with all the activities of those who engage in assembling of goods manufactured into useable form e.g road construction, bridge construction etc. A bag of cement is a product used in construction.

questions.question:
Use the information below to answer questions 13 and 14.

|                   | #        |
|-------------------|----------|
| Sales             | 50,000.00|
| Debtors           | 10,000.00|
| Cash in hand      | 5,000.00 |
| Opening stock     | 30,000.00|
| Creditors         | 8,000.00 |
| Purchases         | 16,000.00|
| Overdraft         | 12,000.00|
| Closing stock     | 10,000.00|

Calculate the working capital
questions.explanation:
Working capital = Current assets - Current liabilities
= (debtors + cash in hand + closing stock) - (overdraft + creditors)
= (10,000 + 5,000 + 10,000) - (8,000 + 12,000)
= 25,000 - 20,000 = 5,000

questions.question:
Use the information below to answer questions 13 and 14

|                   | #        |
|-------------------|----------|
| Sales             | 50,000.00|
| Debtors           | 10,000.00|
| Cash in hand      | 5,000.00 |
| Opening stock     | 30,000.00|
| Creditors         | 8,000.00 |
| Purchases         | 16,000.00|
| Overdraft         | 12,000.00|
| Closing stock     | 10,000.00|

Calculate the gross profit
questions.explanation:
Gross profit = Sales - Cost of goods sold
Cost of goods sold = Opening stock + purchases - closing stock
= 30,000 + 16,000 - 10,000 = 36,000
Gross profit = 50,000 - 36,000 = 14,000

questions.question: Payment made to a carrier for transportation of goods is
questions.explanation: The payment made to a carrier for the transportation of goods is known as 'freight'. This is the charge that is paid for the carriage or transportation of goods by sea, air, or land. A fee is a payment made for professional services, a fare is the money paid by a passenger for travel by public transport, and duty is a tax levied on certain goods and commodities.

questions.question: The principle which prevents an insured from receiving a claim that is more than the value of the loss, if the property is insured by more than one company is:
questions.explanation: Contribution is one of the principle of insurance, this principle prevents the insured from making profit from the insurance because it is a contract of good faith.

questions.question: Central banks sell treasury bills to the public to

B.text: increase cash in the banking system

questions.explanation: Hence, by issuing treasury bills, central banks can raise short-term fund for governments and absorb surplus liquidity from financial markets simultaneously. Therefore, when there is too much money in circulation, the central bank will sell securities to reduce money supply in the economy.

questions.question: Advertisement which is geared towards a particular audience is
questions.explanation: Direct advertising is a method of advertising which is aimed at providing information to a section, target market segment or group of people with relatively similar needs.

questions.question: The quality of money which makes it possible to buy goods in small quantities is
questions.explanation: Money must be capable of being divided into smaller units to enable it to purchase both high and low priced commodities. Therefore, the quality of money which makes it possible to buy goods in small quantities is divisibility.

questions.question: The service of a retailer is part of production because it

C.text: creates a link between consumers and producers

D.text: enables finished goods to reach consumers

questions.explanation: A retailer is a trader who buys goods in small quantities from the wholesaler and sells in bits or units to the final consumers. One of the function is that he breaks the goods down into units for the consumers.

questions.question: A partner who contributes only his name to the formation of a partnership is
questions.explanation: A nominal partner is also known as Quasi partner. He only contributes his name to the formation of the business. He neither contributes capital nor take part in the management of the firm.

questions.question: Consumers could be encouraged to purchase a company's product through
questions.explanation: Advertising is a branch of commerce which is used to create awareness for a particular product and it must be paid for. Advertising informs, educates and persuades people to buy the advertised goods and services.

questions.question: Sea vessels that do not operate on regular times and routes are
questions.explanation: Tramp ships are sea vessels that do not operate on regular times and routes. They are available for hire to transport goods and they usually go wherever the shippers direct them. Ocean liners, container ships, and ferries, on the other hand, operate on fixed schedules and routes.

questions.question: The incentive given to a buyer to encourage prompt payment is
questions.explanation: Cash discount is given in order to encourage prompt payment. For example: '2/7; Net 30 means that if the customer pays within 7 days of receiving the goods, he may take 2% off the amount stated in the invoice, if he does not, he will have to pay the full amount stated in the invoice within 30 days.'

questions.question: A demerit of communication is that it

A.text: hinder quick reception of messages over a long distance

B.text: give room for distortion of fact

D.text: increase the cost of goods in transit

questions.explanation: The sender of communication may have a clear idea about the message but it may still be marked by the poorly chosen words poor organization, awkward sentence structure, lack of coherence, omissions unnecessary jargon, and a failure to clarify its implications.

questions.question: The concept that refers to the sale, transfer or exchange of goods and services is
questions.explanation: Trade is the activity of buying and selling, or exchanging, goods and/or services between people or countries.

questions.question: A document that lists the goods that are being sent from one place to another is
questions.explanation: Shipping note is a document sent to the shipping agent by the exporter. The document contains instructions for transporting the goods.

questions.question: The fees charged on postal order by the post office is
questions.explanation: Poundage is a small fixed charge that is levied by the post office for handling the postal order.

questions.question: An individual that links the producer with the retailer is
questions.explanation: An agent is an individual who acts as an intermediary between the producer and the retailer. They are responsible for facilitating transactions between these two parties, often by promoting the producer's products to potential retailers.

questions.question: At the collapse of a business enterprises, the person appointed to dispose off the assets is called
questions.explanation: A liquidator is a person with the legal authority to act on behalf of a company to sell the company's assets before the company closes in order to generate cash for a variety of reasons including debt repayment.

questions.question: Which of the following regulates and controls the activities in the Nigerian Stock Exchange?
questions.explanation: SEC is in charge of regulating funding schemes across Nigeria. From public funding to crowdfunding schemes, SEC is a significant agency to interrelate with before such schemes can be undertaken by companies in Nigeria.

questions.question: A factor necessary for siting of a warehouse is nearness to
questions.explanation: The pattern of consumption of consumers in an area must be taken into consideration since it is good to site a warehouse near the consumers.

questions.question: The principle which requires the insurance company to disclose to the proposer all material facts of the risk to be covered is
questions.explanation: An übernahme fidei contract is a legal agreement, common to the insurance industry, requiring the highest standard of good faith during disclosure of all material facts that could influence the decision of the other party.

questions.question:
I. Its unlimited nature
II. The number of partners
III. The withdrawal of a major of partner
IV. The bearing of risk

Which of these is both merit and demerit in partnership?
questions.explanation: Partnership are formed by an association of two to twenty persons. The number of partners involved serves as both merit and demerit to partnership business.

questions.question: Parts payments made on allotted shares by subscribers is usually the
questions.explanation: Called up share capital is shares issued to investors, under the understanding that the shares will be paid for at a later date or in installments.

questions.question: The document that explains the types of shares available for sale to the public is:
questions.explanation: A prospectus is a formal document required by and filed with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) that provides details about an investment offering to the public.

questions.question: A government policy that encourages transfer of ownership from foreigners to indigenes of the country is known as
questions.explanation: Indigenization is the transfer of ownership and control of the business enterprises from foreigners to the indigenes. It is a policy designed to ensure greater participation of indigenes in the ownership, control and management of business enterprises.

questions.question: Which of the following attracts only interest but leaves the capital unpaid?
questions.explanation: An irredeemable bond is a bond that the issuer does not have to pay back its principal amount. The issuer only pays interest to the bondholders. Therefore, it attracts only interest but leaves the capital unpaid.

questions.question:
|    | N   | N   |
|---|---|---|
| Stock 1/1    | 20000 | Net sales | 370000 |
| Add purchases    | 250000 |    |    |
| Cost of goods available for sale | 270000 |    |    |
| Less stock 31/12    | 40000 |    |    |
| Cost of goods sold    | 230000 |    |    |
| Rent expenses    | 35000 |    |    |

Find the gross profit
questions.explanation: Gross profit is calculated by subtracting the cost of goods sold from net sales. From the given data, Net sales is N370,000 and Cost of goods sold is N230,000. Therefore, Gross profit = Net sales - Cost of goods sold = N370,000 - N230,000 = N140,000.

questions.question:
|    | N   | N   |
|---|---|---|
| Stock 1/1    | 20000 | Net sales | 370000 |
| Add purchases    | 250000 |    |    |
| Cost of goods available for sale | 270000 |    |    |
| Less stock 31/12    | 40000 |    |    |
| Cost of goods sold    | 230000 |    |    |
| Rent expenses    | 35000 |    |    |

Calculate the net profit
questions.explanation: The net profit is calculated by subtracting the total expenses from the net sales. In this case, the net sales is N370,000 and the total expenses (cost of goods sold and rent expenses) is N265,000. Therefore, the net profit is N370,000 - N265,000 = N105,000.

questions.question: Which of the following is not a veritable source of funds to a public limited liability company?

C.text: funds from the sale of shares

questions.explanation: The sources of finance are: hire purchase, trade credit, loans and overdraft, sales of shares, sales of debentures, bill of exchange, retained profits. Government financial grants are not typically a veritable source for public limited companies.

questions.question: The activity which entails buying of goods in bulk and selling in small quantities to retailers is
questions.explanation: Wholesaling is a business activity which entails buying of goods in bulk from the producer and selling in small quantities to the retailer and other merchants.

questions.question: An advantage of division of labour is

A.text: loss of individual craftmanship is minimized

B.text: productivity and total output is increased

questions.explanation: The advantages of division of labour are: it increase production, development of greater skill, large scale of production, it leads to specialisation.

questions.question: A major objective of all business resources is
questions.explanation: One of the objective of business is to derive maximum profit. Others include: to provide goods and services that will meet the needs of the consumers, to protect the interest of workers etc.

questions.question: A major function of chamber of commerce is

C.text: promoting both home and foreign trade

D.text: promoting trade in a particular line

questions.explanation: They develop trade with other towns outside the country or other town within its territory thereby, promoting home and foreign trade.

questions.question: One of the functions of a retailer is the

D.text: provision of credit facilities to relations

questions.explanation: The functions of the retailer are: selling in small quantities to consumers, provides after sales services, gives advice to the consumers, grants credit facilities to the consumers.

questions.question: The process of converting a non-profit making organisation to a profit-making business is
questions.explanation: Privatization occurs when a government-owned business, operation, or property becomes owned by a private, non-government party. Privatization may also describe a transition that takes a company from being publicly traded to becoming privately held.

questions.question: Which of the following legislation aims primarily at the protection of consumers?
questions.explanation: The Trade description Act was introduced to prevent the deception of consumers by false advertising. The provisions are meant to protect consumers against misleading description of goods and services.

questions.question: An agreement that is enforceable in law is
questions.explanation: A contract is an agreement between two or more parties which is intended by them to have legal backing. The vital thing which turns an agreements into a contract is when the parties intend to be legally bound to carry out their agreements.

questions.question: The rate where a country's exports exchange for its imports is called
questions.explanation: Terms of Trade (TOT) is the rate at which a country's exports exchange for its imports and it is calculated as: TOT = (index of export price / index of import price) × 100.

questions.question: The type of letters that are delivered through the normal mail or by airmail express service is referred to as ______.
questions.explanation: The type of letters that are delivered through the normal mail or by airmail express service is referred to as inland letters. Inland letters are letters that are sent within the same country. They can be delivered through the normal mail service or by airmail express service, depending on the sender's preference and the urgency of the letter.

questions.question: The macro-environmental forces and trends which are a constraint on business operations are referred to as
questions.explanation: External factors of business environment refer to those factors outside the purview of the organization's control that can affect the business, its operations, profits, etc. These factors further impact the internal forces in an organization to a great extent. The effects can be positive or negative.

questions.question: A bill of exchange already accepted can be discounted by the holder in
questions.explanation: A bill of exchange is addressed by one person to another and it must be an order to pay. Also, the order must be unconditional.

questions.question: An example of a cartel is
questions.explanation: A cartel is a group of independent market participants who collude with each other in order to improve their profits and dominate the market e.g. OPEC.

questions.question: The maximum number of shareholders in a public liability company is
questions.explanation: In a private company, the transfer of shares is restricted, and the number of shareholders may range from a minimum of one to maximum of fifty. Public limited -liability companies must have a minimum of seven to maximum of unlimited shareholders.

questions.question: An agent who has to sell perishable goods without the prior authority of the owner becomes an agent by
questions.explanation: Agency by necessity arises when an emergency situation happens. When somebody who is possession of another person's property has to do something to preserve the property.

questions.question: The payment made by a speculator to the buyer when he is unable to deliver stocks on the agreed date is
questions.explanation: Backwardation is a percentage paid by a person selling stock for the right of delaying its delivery.

questions.question: Insurance against burglary is an example of
questions.explanation: Indemnity insurance is an insurance in which the insurer promises to make the insured party whole again for any covered loss in exchange for premiums the policyholder pays.

questions.question: One disadvantages of advertising is that it
questions.explanation: Some advertisement may be false and misleading as they make exaggerated claims. Also it leads to monopoly and encourages buyers to make unnecessary purchase.

questions.question: An announcement of a person's willingness to enter into a contract is referred to as
questions.explanation: An offer is a proposal made by one party (the offeror) to another person (the offeree) that indicates a willingness to enter into a contract.

questions.question: The function of commerce in relation to production is

B.text: providing a link between the different stage of conversion of good

D.text: helping in the extraction of raw materials from nature

questions.explanation: Commerce links producers and consumers. Production is meant for ultimate consumption. Commerce makes possible to link producers and consumers through retailers and wholesalers and also through the aids to trade. Thus commerce creates contact between the centers of production and consumption and links them.

questions.question: The process of dividing tasks into jobs and departments and delegating authority is known as
questions.explanation: Organising involves the division of work into different sections, allocating responsibilities and authority to all components of the organisation in order to achieve the objectives.

questions.question: The government agency involved in issuing of export licences is

TEXTES DE COMPRÉHENSION
Lisez les deux textes ci-dessous et répondez aux questions qui les suivent.
TEXTE I
Les Sports
Près de quinze millions de Français n'ont jamais pratiqué de sport. Ce qui ne veut pas dire qu'ils soient inactifs... Mais parmi ceux qui pratiquent du sport, on trouvera surtout: Les chasseurs, les pêcheurs, les joueurs de boules et de pétanque, les skieurs et les amateurs de voile. Les chasseurs sont au nombre d'environ 2,5 millions. Ils achètent chaque année un permi et considerent leur activité avec tellement de sérieux que leur Fédération avait adressé une lettre aux différents candidats lors des élections législatives de mars 1978 pour leur demander quel était leur programme de développement de la chasse. Le grand jour pour tous les chasseurs de France est naturellement le jour de l'ouverture de la chasse.
Les pêcheurs sont encore plus nombreux puisque leur nombre est estimé à 5 millions. Les joueurs de boules et de pétanque sont surtout très nombreux dans le midi de la France. Plus proches du sport proprement dit sont les skieurs et les amateurs de voile don't le nombre augmente chaque année considérablement.
Le mouvement actuel de retour à la nature favorise une renaissance de la marche à pied, de la promenade à bicyclette ou à cheval. Pour les autres sports, il faut bien dire qu'ils attirent plus de spectateurs que de participants.
C'est le cas en particulier des trois grands événements sportifs de l'année- le Tour de France (course cycliste), la Coupe de France de football et le Tournoi des Cinq Nations où s'affrontent des équipes de rugby à 15, représentant la France, l'Angleterre, l'Ecosse, le Pays des Galles et l'Irlande.
Adapté:Michel Paoletti et Ross Stede (1980)
D'après le texte, généralement, les Français

Les pêcheurs sont encore plus nombreux puisque leur nombre est estimé à 5 millions. Les joueurs de boules et de pétanque sont surtout très nombreux dans le midi de la France. Plus proches du sport proprement dit sont les skieurs et les amateurs de voile don't le nombre augmente chaque année considérablement.
Le mouvement actuel de retour à la nature favorise une renaissance de la marche à pied, de la promenade à bicyclette ou à cheval. Pour les autres sports, il faut bien dire qu'ils attirent plus de spectateurs que de participants.
C'est le cas en particulier des trois grands événements sportifs de l'année- le Tour de France (course cycliste), la Coupe de France de football et le Tournoi des Cinq Nations où s'affrontent des équipes de rugby à 15, représentant la France, l'Angleterre, l'Ecosse, le Pays des Galles et l'Irlande.
Adapté:Michel Paoletti et Ross Stede (1980)

TEXTE I
Les Sports
Près de quinze millions de Français n'ont jamais pratiqué de sport. Ce qui ne veut pas dire qu'ils soient inactifs... Mais parmi ceux qui pratiquent du sport, on trouvera surtout: Les chasseurs, les pêcheurs, les joueurs de boules et de pétanque, les skieurs et les amateurs de voile. Les chasseurs sont au nombre d'environ 2,5 millions. Ils achètent chaque année un permi et considerent leur activité avec tellement de sérieux que leur Fédération avait adressé une lettre aux différents candidats lors des élections législatives de mars 1978 pour leur demander quel était leur programme de développement de la chasse. Le grand jour pour tous les chasseurs de France est naturellement le jour de l'ouverture de la chasse.
Les pêcheurs sont encore plus nombreux puisque leur nombre est estimé à 5 millions. Les joueurs de boules et de pétanque sont surtout très nombreux dans le midi de la France. Plus proches du sport proprement dit sont les skieurs et les amateurs de voile don't le nombre augmente chaque année considérablement.
Le mouvement actuel de retour à la nature favorise une renaissance de la marche à pied, de la promenade à bicyclette ou à cheval. Pour les autres sports, il faut bien dire qu'ils attirent plus de spectateurs que de participants.
C'est le cas en particulier des trois grands événements sportifs de l'année- le Tour de France (course cycliste), la Coupe de France de football et le Tournoi des Cinq Nations où s'affrontent des équipes de rugby à 15, représentant la France, l'Angleterre, l'Ecosse, le Pays des Galles et l'Irlande.

Questions 31-40 sur l'Oral
Le son /e/ apparaît dans

TEXTE II
Lorsque j'étais enfant, ce que je faisais
Mes souvenirs d'enfance sont remplis de beaucoup d'expériences intéressantes. Lorsque j'étais enfant, je cherchais toujours à être dans la compagnie des autres enfants comme moi. J'avais horreur de rester seul, si bien que je pleurais pendant des heures si je ne me voyais qu' entouré de solitude.
Ma mère aimait m'acheter des friandises, mais mon père était un peu avare sur des questions de friandises. Chaque fois que maman n'était pas à la maison pour m'en donner, je devais faire semblant d'être malade pour que papa m'en achète. Et il faut imaginer combien de fois il me disait: "Je sais que tu seras bientôt guéri".
Comme j'étais l'enfant unique de mes parents à cette époque-là, l'on comprendrait facilement pourquoi mon père, malgré son avarice, était bien indulgent envers moi.
C'était à l'école que je profitais le plus de sa gentillesse et, bien sûr de celle de ma mère.
Je me rappelle avoir demandé trois fois l'argent pour un seul livre de calcul! Je n'avais qu'à demander, et ils me donnaient volontiers. Mais, quelquefois pour y arriver, il fallait mentir. Si je mentais pour demander un peu d'argent, ce n'était pas par méchanceté; c'était plutôt parce que je ne savais pas mieux, j'ai trouvé le jeu gai.
D'ailleurs, je ne faisais pas que mentir.
En classe, j'avais la réputation d'être l'un des meilleurs élèves. Même les instituteurs les moins indulgents ont reconnu en moi cette petite qualité. Je faisais l'école buissonnière, c'est vrai, mais je faisais de mon mieux pour rattraper le retard. Il est nécessaire aussi de signaler que mon habitude de faire l'école buissonnière s'arrêtait après la première semaine de la rentrée pour ne reprendre qu'après l'examen. Quand j'y pense aujourd'hui, j'avoue que je trouve cette habitude maligne. N'est ce pas pour éviter les travaux de champs?
Néanmoins, je passais une grande partie de mes vacances à la ferme non avec mon père, mais avec mon grand père. Mon père avait sa ferme, mais on s'amusait mieux avec mon grandpère.
C'est chez celui-ci qu'on mangeait mieux.
D'après Ajiboye, Tunde (2008) First Essays in French.
L'auteur était gâté surtout

Idan aka kira mutum inuwar giginya ana nufin ba ya kyautata wa

A karanta wadannan labaru, sannan a amsa tambayoyin da suka biyo kowannensu
I
A karkar da ma wasu manyan garuruwa kalilan, mutane kan hadu su rika cin abinci tare. Akan zabi gidan mutum daya daga cikinsu ya zama shi ne matattara. Mutumin da aka zabi gidansa, kusan shi ne shugaba, kuma ya fi kowa yawan shekaru. A wasu lokuta kuma, ana duba gidan da ya fi yalwa, ko ya fi zama kan hanya, babu wahala so sai zuwa gidan, musamman da damina.

A wurin haduwa a ci abinci tare, kowane magidanci zai kawo abincin da aka dafa a gidansa, wanda ya fi shiga. Nan fa matan da suka kware suke shan yabo da godiya. Wadanda ba su iya ba kuwa, aiki ya gan su da kuma takaici, saboda wasu mazan kan yi wa matansu gori. Ba nan ma abin ya tsaya ba, rashin iya abincin nan na iya haddasa mutuwar aure, idan ba a kai hankali nesa ba. Al'amari ya yi muni ke nan.

Cikin abubuwan da ake kawowa, akwai tuwo da shinkafa da fate da dan wake da dambu da alkubus da doya da taliya da kuma makaroni. Ana kawo wasu daga cikin wadannan nau'o'in abinci tare da miya, wasu kuma a siffar dafa-duka. Duka dai wannan, ya dangara da irin cefanen da maigida ya yi.

Akwai alfanu babba game da wannan zama. Da farko, akwai kyautata dangantaka da zaman tare. Ana kuma taimakon juna ta hanyar tattauna matsalolin da suka addabe su. wanda ma ba ya da karfin yin abinci wani lokaci, ba zai tagayyara ba, zai sami abin da zai ci a wajen.

questions.question:
"Ba neman aure ke da wuya ba, shiga-ka-fito," ka ga shiga-ka-fito din nan, lallai shiga-ka-fito din ne! Domin aljihu kan jigata kafin a kai ga biki. Tuddan da al'ada ta tanada, wadanda dole sai an haye su, suna da yawa.

yanzu dauki misalin kayan na-gani-ina-so, wato 'yan kayan nan da ake shiryawa a kai gidan su yarinya a karon farko. Ma'anar yin haka, wai iyaye su san cewa manemin aren 'yarsu da gaske yake. To, ina dole ga yin haka? Da can da yake zuwa yana zance da 'yarsu yana yi mata hira, ba a san da gaske yake ba?
Gangaro kan kayan toshi. Nan ma tsabagen kudi ake kashewa a sayi suturu da kayan shafe-shafe a kai wa yarinya. Kada fa ka ce zuwa zance da manemi yake yana yi wa yarinya kyauta mako-mako, shi ke nan, ya wadatar. Ina, ko kadan!

Kada ka mance da kudin gaisuwar iyaye da dukiyar aure kafin a yi baiko da sa ranar biki. Kudi ne madiddiki ake tanada a kai wa iyayen yarinya da niyyar dai wannan abu da aka ambata.

Duk bayan wannan, ana sa ranar aure, manemin yarinya ya dosa karaka ina ke nan daga wannan gari zuwa wancan, ko ma wannan gari zuwa wancan da sunan gayar da iyaye da kakanninta, wai don su san shi. I, za su san shi mana, tun da ba kawo jiki kma, uwa-uba za a shirya kayan lefe na fitar hankali a kai wa yarinya. Nan ma dukiya ake narkawa.

Hakika duk wadannan abubuwa al'ada ce kawai ta kakaba wa al'umma. Ai ta fuskar dukiya, muhimmin abu ga aure, sadaki. Amma abin takaici, yanzu an yi masa mahalli a can karshen sahu!

Duk bayan wannan, ana sa ranar aure, manemin yarinya ya dosa karaka ina ke nan daga wannan gari zuwa wancan, ko ma wannan gari zuwa wancan da sunan gayar da iyaye da kakanninta, wai don su san shi. I, za su san shi mana, tun da ba kawo jiki kma, uwa-uba za a shirya kayan lefe na fitar hankali a kai wa yarinya. Nan ma dukiya ake narkawa.

Hakika duk wadannan abubuwa al'ada ce kawai ta kakaba wa al'umma. Ai ta fuskar dukiya, muhimmin abu ga aure, sadaki. Amma abin takaici, yanzu an yi masa mahalli a can karshen sahu!

I

A wani gari can yamma da Magumi, wai shi Tsauni, an yi wani yaro mai suna Salihi. Iyqyensa ba masu wadata ba ne, amma sun yi kokarin ganin ya yi ilmin boko dana Arabiya. Bayan Salihi ya kammala karatun firamare, sai mahaifinsa Tanimu, ya nema masa makarantar gaba da firamare. Domin an ce “Ilimi gishirin zaman duniya.”

Amma kuma samo wa Salihi babbar makarantar Magumi bai yi wa mahaifiyarsa Dahira dadi ba, don bata son danta ya yi nesa da ita. Dalili shi ne dansu tilo namiji, sauran hudun kuwa duk mata ne. Bugu da kari, tana jin munanan labarai iri-iri da kan faru a irin wadannan makarantu.

Bayan Salihi ya isa makaranta, sai ya dukufa kan karatu gadan-gadan. Zuwansa ke da wuya, sai suka kulla abota da wani dan ajinsu, wai shi Kasa. Kafin ya ankara, sai da abokinsa ya jefa shi cikin wata kungiyar asiri.

Da ya farga da halin da ya shiga, sai ya yi kokarin fita daga cikinta, amma aka nuna masa ai ba a haka. “In har ka ce za ka fice, lallai za a kassara ka, ko ma a halaka ka” in ji abokinsa.

Ganin halin tsaka-mai-wuya da ya shiga, sai ya tsayar da shawarar ya fallasa kungiyar, in ya so komai ta tafasa to kone. Ya je ya shaida wa shugaban makaranta. Nan take ya sanya jami’an tsaro suka kamo dukkan ‘yan kungiyar. Kotu ta yanke musu hukunci, sannan aka kai su gidan jarun. Da ma an ce, “Komai nisan jifa kasa za ya fado.”

Wakar 'Gadar Zare' ta Zababbun Wakokin Da na Yanzu na D. Abdulkadir 'yar kwar nawa ce?

II

Hausawa wasu mutane ne da suka ba abinci muhimmanci a rayuwarsu, domin duk wata fafitika da gwama numfashi da ba hammata iska, ana yi wa ciki ne. Wato cikin biyu: daya ya yiwu an ci an koshi, ko kuma ana cikin halin nema ne.

Kullum, da zaran gari ya waye, wasu tun da jijjifi, za a ga sun fita neman abin da za su ci, su da iyalansu, domin a samu rufin asiri. Saboda haka, ba a barin kowa a gida sai tsofaffi da mata da yara da kuma ragwagwe, kowa ya tafi neman halalilya.

A al'adance, hausawa suna da lokuta uku na cin abinci a kowace rana, wato safe da rana da dare. A mafi yawan lokuta da safe akan sha abu mai ruwa-ruwa, kamar koko da kosai ko kunu. Wasu kuma, sukan dumama abin da aka ci a daren da ya gabata. Da rana, kuma akan dafa duk irin abin da ya samu kamar shinkafa da wake ko dambu ko kuma danwake. Da daddare kuma, kusan kowane gida za a sa mu cewa ana dafa tuwo da miya ne, ko miyar kuka ko kubewa ko taushe ko kalkashi da dai sauransu, da nama ko babu nama. Duk ko ma mene ne ya samu, wato dai "Daidai ruwa daidai kurji."

Har ila yau, ko da yake ba kowa yake da karfin dora girki sau uku ba a rana saboda halin yau, amma a kan sami makwabta na gari masu tausayi da lura, su kan kira makwabtansu domin su ci abincin, ko suna da shi ko ba su da shi. Da ma tunfil-azal, an san Bahaushe da halin taimako ga dan'uwansa.

A zamanin da, za a ga Bahaushe yana kokarin ya yi noma domin kada gidansa a zauna da yunwa. Amma yanzu, zamananci ya mayar da tunaninsa ya koma kan kasuwanci ko aikin ofis a maimakon aikin gona saboda lalaci da son jiki.

Me ake nufi da gwama numfashi a labarin?

II

Hausawa wasu mutane ne da suka ba abinci muhimmanci a rayuwarsu, domin duk wata fafitika da gwama numfashi da ba hammata iska, ana yi wa ciki ne. Wato cikin biyu: daya ya yiwu an ci an koshi, ko kuma ana cikin halin nema ne.

Kullum, da zaran gari ya waye, wasu tun da jijjifi, za a ga sun fita neman abin da za su ci, su da iyalansu, domin a samu rufin asiri. Saboda haka, ba a barin kowa a gida sai tsofaffi da mata da yara da kuma ragwagwe, kowa ya tafi neman halalilya.

A al'adance, hausawa suna da lokuta uku na cin abinci a kowace rana, wato safe da rana da dare. A mafi yawan lokuta da safe akan sha abu mai ruwa-ruwa, kamar koko da kosai ko kunu. Wasu kuma, sukan dumama abin da aka ci a daren da ya gabata. Da rana, kuma akan dafa duk irin abin da ya samu kamar shinkafa da wake ko dambu ko kuma danwake. Da daddare kuma, kusan kowane gida za a sa mu cewa ana dafa tuwo da miya ne, ko miyar kuka ko kubewa ko taushe ko kalkashi da dai sauransu, da nama ko babu nama. Duk ko ma mene ne ya samu, wato dai "Daidai ruwa daidai kurji."

Har ila yau, ko da yake ba kowa yake da karfin dora girki sau uku ba a rana saboda halin yau, amma a kan sami makwabta na gari masu tausayi da lura, su kan kira makwabtansu domin su ci abincin, ko suna da shi ko ba su da shi. Da ma tunfil-azal, an san Bahaushe da halin taimako ga dan'uwansa.

A zamanin da, za a ga Bahaushe yana kokarin ya yi noma domin kada gidansa a zauna da yunwa. Amma yanzu, zamananci ya mayar da tunaninsa ya koma kan kasuwanci ko aikin ofis a maimakon aikin gona saboda lalaci da son jiki.

Wane suna ya fi dacewa da wannan labarin?

A.text: 'Da ruwan ciki ake jan na rijiya.'
